permuteDE ggplot theme

Source: R/PlottingUtils.R
permuteDEtheme.Rd

This function returns the ggplot2 theme used throughout the permuteDE plotting functions.

Usage

permuteDEtheme(
  color = "black",
  base_size = 10,
  base_line_linewidth = 0.5,
  base_rect_linewidth = 0.5,
  axis_title_size = 12,
  plot_title_size = 14,
  plot_margin_cm = 1,
  legend_text_size = 10,
  legend_position = "bottom",
  legend_title_hjust = 0,
  legend_title_vjust = 0.5,
  axis_tick_length_mm = 1,
  rotate_x_axis_text_90 = FALSE,
  rotate_y_axis_text_90 = FALSE
)

Arguments

color

Color of text and lines of the plot

base_size

The size of the font for the axis labels

base_line_linewidth

The line width for most lines

base_rect_linewidth

The line width for rectangular boxes

axis_title_size

The font size of the axis title

plot_title_size

The font size of the plot title

plot_margin_cm

The margin around the plot in centimeters

legend_text_size

0.75*base_size

legend_position

The placement of the legend in the plot

legend_title_hjust

Left-right justification of legend title

legend_title_vjust

Top-bottom justification of legend title

axis_tick_length_mm

Axis tick length in mm

rotate_x_axis_text_90

Boolean value indicating whether to rotate the x-axis text by 90 degrees

rotate_y_axis_text_90

Boolean value indicating whether to rotate the y-axis text by 90 degrees
